description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden hutch cabinet with a dark-stained top and shelves, and a deep green painted body. The upper section features two wide open shelves, ideal for displaying items, with a vertical back panel that appears to be made of wood planks. The lower section consists of a countertop, three drawers, and four cabinet doors, each likely concealing additional storage space. The cabinet doors and drawers are fitted with small, round handles or knobs, and the base is slightly recessed, giving the piece a sturdy yet elegant appearance. The overall construction suggests a robust, traditional design suitable for urban interiors such as cafes, shops, or residential kitchens. The finish is matte with a slightly textured surface, and the visible wood grain adds to its rustic charm.
description: A large, freestanding wooden hutch cabinet with open shelves above and drawers and doors below, finished in dark wood and deep green paint. It features round handles and a sturdy, traditional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the cabinet and the overhanging top and shelves.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid, flat back panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the depth and overhang of the top and shelves.
description_view_3: Front view revealing open shelves, three drawers, four cabinet doors, and visible handles.
